node.html:
• Selected as a Brown Venture Prize 2025 Finalist for UAPPLY, recognized for its potential to transform university admissions across Africa.
  • Received the Karen T. Romer UTRA Award (2023) for independent undergraduate research on simulating child language acquisition with LLMs to preserve under-represented languages.
  • Relevant courses: Deep Learning (CSCI 1470), Machine Learning (DATA 2060), Large Language Models & Gen AI (DATA 1080), Computational Linguistics (CSCI 1460), Reintegrating AI (CSCI 2951X), Computer Systems (CSCI 0330), Data Structures & Algorithms (CSCI 0200), Scientific Programming in C++ (ENGN 2912B).

• 1st Place — Rwanda National Science Fair (2019): Developed an affordable cell phone microscope using easily accessible materials to benefit local hospitals, universities, and high school teachers.
  • Concentration in Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science (C++, Java, Visual Basic, SQL).
  • Served as Student Government President — spearheaded campaigns that led to the historic election of the first female president-elect in 2019.
  • Participated in the Yale Young African Scholars program (2017) and won the Kigali Debate League (2016).
